issues.description: OnPlay trigger with two separate Rest actions is incorrect. Should use single Rest action with maxCount:2 to allow choosing 'up to 2' characters in one action.

Trigger effect with maxCost:5 contradicts card text which specifies 'cost of 2 or less'. Should be maxCost:2 if this effect were valid, but this entire effect appears to be erroneous and should be removed.
Second effect uses generic 'Trigger' which is not a valid trigger for a Main card. Main cards should only have OnPlay trigger.
